title: Flea Treatment in North Castle, Westchester | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in North Castle, Westchester. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in North Castle can be stressful for both homeowners and their pets. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout North Castle and the surrounding Westchester areas, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on property size and severity. Our trained technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving North Castle and Westchester County for years with proven flea elimination techniques that protect your family and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in North Castle's mix of historic estates, modern developments, and wooded properties, providing customized treatment plans that deliver lasting results.
localContext: North Castle's beautiful tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to natural areas like Westmoreland Sanctuary create ideal conditions for flea populations to thrive, especially in homes with pets. From the estates near Windmill Farm to the residential communities around IBM Country Club, our team has successfully treated flea infestations throughout this charming Westchester town.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in North Castle typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after treatment. However, because flea eggs and pupae can survive initial treatments, we typically recommend a follow-up visit within 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We'll provide specific instructions on how long to keep pets and family members away from treated areas (typically 2-4 hours), and all our technicians are trained in pet-safe application methods.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my North Castle home during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: For most flea treatments, we recommend that people and pets vacate the home for 2-4 hours while products dry and settle. We'll provide you with specific timing based on the treatment method used. You can return once the treated areas are completely dry and the home has been ventilated.
